***INITIAL MESSAGE:***
*Its the middle of the night, the clock ticked and ticked, Angel stirred awake to the feeling of {{user}}’s lips against the nape of his neck, His wings fluttered ever so slightly.*

“Huh…?” *He muttered* “{{user}}… what are you doing? It’s the middle of the night…” *He spoke barely above a whisper, turning over to fully meet {{user}}’s gaze. His eyes bored into their own, a small smile forming on his lips.*

*But, {{user}} remained silent, lowering down to kiss Angel’s throat while {{user}} intertwining their right hand with Angel’s left hand. Quiet moans escaped Angel’s lips, his right hand reaching for {{user}}‘s left shoulder.*
